overall.description: A slow cinematic pan across a rainy courtyard in a Western frontier town, rendered in high-fidelity game engine graphics. The camera reveals a two-story wooden building with a veranda and a character standing above, before panning left to show a brick arcade with arched doorways and a wooden cart.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy courtyard of frontier hotel with wooden veranda

agents.ego_description: slowly moving left across the wet courtyard, observing the wooden building and balcony above

notable_agents.action: standing motionless on the upper balcony, looking out over the rainy courtyard

entered.detail: dark wooden frontier building with upper veranda and white railings
covered second-floor balcony with white railings and wooden support pillars
external staircase leading up to the veranda level
large planters with greenery on the ground floor near the pillars

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a rainy courtyard with a two-story wooden building dominating the right side. A character stands motionless on the upper veranda overlooking the wet cobblestones below. Rain falls steadily throughout the courtyard, which is partially sheltered by the building's overhang.

scene_state.functional_zone: courtyard with brick arcade and wooden wagon

events.description: camera pans left revealing historic brick building with arched doorways on the left side
character on balcony exits frame to the right as camera continues panning left

agents.ego_description: continuing to pan left across the courtyard, revealing the brick arcade and wooden cart while the balcony character moves out of view

notable_agents.action: standing on the balcony, visible at the right edge of frame before exiting view

entered.detail: historic brick structure with three arched openings and green window frames
wooden wagon with large spoked wheels parked against the left wall
metal fence with vertical bars at the courtyard entrance
trailing green vegetation hanging from the roof edge of the brick building

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues panning left, the brick building with arched doorways comes into view, along with a wooden cart parked in the courtyard. The character on the balcony gradually moves to the right edge of the frame and exits around the 22-second mark. The scene concludes focused on the left side of the courtyard with the historic brick arcade and hanging vines.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous leftward pan across a rainy frontier courtyard, shifting focus from a wooden residential structure to a historic brick arcade. It begins with a view of a two-story wooden building where a motionless character stands on an upper veranda overlooking wet cobblestones. As the camera glides left, the character gradually drifts toward the edge of the frame and disappears from view while the steady rain continues to fall. The scene then expands to reveal a brick building characterized by arched doorways and a parked wooden cart. Finally, the movement settles on the left side of the courtyard, highlighting the textures of the brick arcade and hanging vines.
